channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Airbnb co-founder taps Peter Arnell as first U.S. Chief Brand Architect
item.description: Arnell joins Gebbia’s National Design Studio under Trump to unify UX across 27,000 federal sites and streamline how Americans use government services.

item.title: Federal regulator to ban all Chinese labs from vetting US-bound devices over national security concerns – major supply chain shakeup will affect 75 percent of devices sold in the US
item.description: Chinese labs are set to lose their FCC testing accreditation after a unanimous commission vote.

item.title: Argos expands its bank holiday sale with dozens of new deals — I've found the 22 best tech offers with up to 40% off
item.description: The Argos bank holiday sale continues this week, so I've looked through the event once again to pick out all the best new tech deals that are still available.

item.title: Forget stealing our jobs — robots are now coming for the most human pastime: causing havoc on public transport
item.description: Southwest Airlines had a robot passenger problem which caused an hour-long flight delay.

item.title: ChatGPT's new default model is more factual and better at personalization
item.description: OpenAI is deploying GPT-5.5 Instant to all users starting today.

item.title: Hausse des prix de la RAM, délais rallongés et pénurie, tout comprendre de la crise de la RAM
item.description: Vous entendez partout sans peut-être réellement comprendre les enjeux. La mémoire RAM s'arrache à prix d'or en ce moment et certains acteurs délaissent même le marché grand public. Une situation qui concerne en premier lieu les PC, mais pourrait par capillarité atteindre tous les produits tech. On vous explique tout ce que vous devez savoir à propos de la crise de la RAM. ...

item.title: Book publishers accuse Meta and Mark Zuckerberg of copyright infringement
item.description: The class action suit concerns unauthorized scraping by Llama AI.

item.title: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI after a chatbot allegedly posed as a doctor
item.description: According to Pennsylvania's filing, a Character.AI chatbot presented itself as a licensed psychiatrist during a state investigation, and also fabricated a serial number for its state medical license.

item.title: « Sans résilience sur les terres rares, pas de souveraineté industrielle » : Paris lance un plan national pour réduire la dépendance à la Chine
item.description: Ce mardi 5 mai, Bercy a lancé un « plan national sur les terres rares et les minerais critiques », des métaux indispensables aux secteurs de l'éolien, des voitures électriques et des dispositifs militaires. La production et le traitement de ces matériaux sont en très grande majorité dans les mains de la Chine.

item.title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
item.description: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits instead. Elon Musk took the […]

item.title: Alexa+ is now available on a bunch of Bose speakers
item.description: This is the upgraded smart assistant's debut on a non-Amazon device.

item.title: 'Phishing campaigns continue to improve sophistication and refinement': Microsoft flags major 'sophisticated' phishing campaign targeting 35,000 users across 26 countries
item.description: The goal is to steal Microsoft credentials and bypass MFA, the company says.

item.title: OpenAI claims ChatGPT’s new default model hallucinates way less
item.description: OpenAI's newest default model for ChatGPT might not make stuff up as much. Hallucinations have been an ongoing problem for AI models, but OpenAI says its new GPT-5.5 Instant model has "significant improvements in factuality across the board." The company claims that, based on "internal evaluations," GPT-5.5 Instant produced "52.5% fewer hallucinated claims" than its […]...

item.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant, a new default model for ChatGPT
item.description: The company said the model reduces hallucination in sensitive areas such as law, medicine, and finance, while maintaining the low latency of its predecessor.

item.title: 5 Android 17 features that could be announced at Google's pre-I/O Android reveal — including Motion Assist and app locking
item.description: Save the date: the next Android Show is being held on May 12, and we have some ideas of what might be shown off there.

item.title: Chrome on Android will now let you share your approximate location
item.description: The feature is also coming to desktops soon.

item.title: Google will livestream The Android Show: I/O Edition on May 12
item.description: The virtual event will showcase some of the biggest changes to the OS in years.

item.title: C’est officiel, Google nous donne rendez-vous pour un Android Show avant la Google I/O
item.description: Comme en 2025, Google prend les devants avant sa grande conférence Google I/O pour dédier une conférence à son système d'exploitation. L'Android Show 2026 a une date.

item.title: I've been a Netflix subscriber for 25 years, and I can't decide if Clips is the best or worst thing to happen to the mobile app
item.description: We go hands-on with Netflix's new Clips feature and find it both underpowered and addictive.

item.title: Book publishers sue Meta over AI’s ‘word-for-word’ copying
item.description: Meta is facing a class action lawsuit filed by five major book publishers and one author over claims the company "engaged in one of the most massive infringements of copyrighted materials in history" when training its Llama AI models, as reported earlier by The New York Times. In their suit, Macmillan, McGraw Hill, Elsevier, Hachette, […]

item.title: Microsoft’s new Xbox shake-up is all about platform changes
item.description: Microsoft's new Xbox chief, Asha Sharma, has spent the past couple of months making her mark on the Xbox organization. After focusing on highly requested Xbox console features, reducing the price of Game Pass, and moving Microsoft Gaming back to Xbox, Sharma is now reorganizing the Xbox platform team at Microsoft today. The changes will […]

item.title: Jusqu’à 10 mois d’attente pour le permis de conduire : voici les pires départements de France
item.description: En France, passer son permis de conduire s'avère être une formalité pour certains, quand ça relève pour d'autres plutôt du parcours du combattant. Décrocher le sésame en un éclair ou attendre un an, la fracture entre les départements est totale. On a épluché la carte des délais d'attente, découvrez si vous vivez dans une zone sinistrée ou si vous allez pouvoir conduire avant la fin de l’année. ...

item.title: The Met Gala 2026 looks that broke the internet (and the group chat)
item.description: The Met Gala 2026 embraced the "Fashion Is Art" dress code, and these standout celebrity looks sparked the biggest reactions online.

item.title: Coinbase lays off nearly 700 workers in 'AI-native' restructuring
item.description: CEO Brian Armstrong blamed a downturn in crypto markets.

item.title: Fallout co-creator says players nowadays are 'handed an opinion from the online channel they’re watching' — 'They find someone they just like, and then that person’s opinion becomes their opinion'
item.description: Timothy Cain, the co-creator of Fallout and the co-developer of The Outer Worlds, has shared his opinion on online discourse and how some players can't form their own opinion about games anymore.

item.title: Arrêt de la 2G et 3G : le guide pour préparer votre smartphone
item.description: Avec l'arrêt progressif des réseaux 2G et 3G, les opérateurs vont réutiliser ces fréquences pour renforcer leurs réseaux 4G et 5G. Mais que se passe-t-il pour votre smartphone ? On fait le point.

item.title: Canvas maker Instructure reveals data breach — confirms user personal information leaked
item.description: ShinyHunters claims Instructure attack, says nearly 9,000 schools worldwide affected.

item.title: Looks like Valve's Steam Machine might finally be on its way after a huge importing effort — and despite our fears, it might actually support full-fat 4K 120Hz and VRR in the end, making it a full PS5 and Xbox replacement
item.description: Valve's Steam Machine may be close to launch –and a post-launch firmware update may deliver HDMI 2.1

item.title: From Alan Shepard to Artemis, celebrating 65 years of Americans in space
item.description: On the morning of May 5th, 1961, 37-year-old Alan Shepard woke up, ate a breakfast (consisting of a filet mignon wrapped in bacon, scrambled eggs, and orange juice), strapped into the Freedom 7 rocket, and blasted off into space, becoming the first American astronaut to do so. Shepard's historic flight - and the first crewed […]

item.title: This viral ereader has come out of nowhere, and bookworms can’t get enough of it — but it ‘could ring alarm bells’ for Amazon as it surpasses the Kindle Colorsoft on the retailer’s charts
item.description: The Xteink X4 ereader is the latest social media tech obsession, and it's emerging as a serious Kindle rival.
